title: UFO Crash Retrieval with Whistleblower Jake Barber #aliens #ufo
summary: Whistleblower Jake Barber describes his involvement in recovering a non-human craft referred to as 'the egg' during a helicopter operation. He details his role as a helicopter pilot using a long line to transport the approximately 20-foot object at night.

key_claims.claim: A non-human craft referred to as 'the egg' was recovered
The recovered object was approximately 20 feet in length
Barber served as helicopter pilot during the recovery operation and hovered directly over the object
A 150-foot long line with a remote hook was used to transport the object
Ground team members wrapped nets around the object and physically touched it
The recovery was a surprise to everyone involved and was recognized as something extraordinary
